svg.title: Threat intelligence system architecture
svg.desc: Django monolith with three separate vertical flows: feeds, configuration, and news processing.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about threat feed sources')
sendPrompt('What pages are in the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How do adapters normalize feed data?')
sendPrompt('What does the processing pipeline do?')
sendPrompt('What models are configured in admin?')
sendPrompt('What gets upserted to the database?')
sendPrompt('How does the news fetch command work?')
